violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Paint edges on shelf that holds cutting boards. -Rusty shelves need replaced in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in kitchen need more thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors in walk in cooler are rusty.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back entry door has gap on bottom. (Screen needs replaced or cleaned).

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Sliced deli meats for calzone at 83F. Keep above 140 or below 41.--Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Tomatoes on ice need to be either surrounded by more ice or kept in more shallow container.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Repaint, cover or replace shelving that has exposed bare wood in kitchen. -Rusty shelves need replaced in walk in cooler.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Remove cloth rug from front serving area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors including in walk in cooler need more thorough cleaning.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back screen door has gap at bottom that needs weather stripping.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Sausage, deli ham and pepperoni on warmer at 110F. Either needs to be held at below 41, above 140 or marked with what time it is to be discarded (4 hrs.).
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
